name: Baked Tomatoes Stuffed with Spinach
recipeIngredient: 3 large tomatoes or 6 medium ripe tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach well; trim, drain, and cook in water clinging to it.
2. Cook the frozen spinach only until thawed and heated through. Drain and chop in a processor or blender with 1/3 cup of the Parmesan, mayonnaise, and onion. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Halve the large tomatoes or leave the medium tomatoes whole. Scoop out seeds and some of the pulp. Sprinkle with a little salt and drain upside down for 5 minutes or more.
4. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
5. Pile spinach into the tomatoes; sprinkle with remaining Parmesan and place in an ovenproof dish.
6. Top each with a dot of butter and bake for 10 to 15 minutes until bubbling hot.
